name: workshop-travel-agent
description: Plans trips by searching flights and hotels, comparing options, and recommending itineraries

skills.name: Plan Trip
skills.description: Plans a complete trip with flights and hotels for given dates and destinations

skills.name: Search Flights
skills.description: Searches available flights between two cities on a given date

skills.name: Search Hotels
skills.description: Searches available hotels in a city for given dates and budget
